youtube.title: GCP Q9: Model Governance on Vertex AI & Assured Workloads #Shorts
youtube.description: Designing a robust model governance framework on GCP for highly regulated financial applications demands a synergistic approach. Vertex AI streamlines model development, deployment, and monitoring, while Assured Workloads establishes a compliant environment, enforcing data residency and access controls. Cloud Audit Logs meticulously track all activities, ensuring an immutable audit trail for regulatory compliance. IAM integrates with these services to define granular permissions, and Data Loss Prevention safeguards sensitive financial data within the ML pipeline. This comprehensive architecture ensures not only operational efficiency but also strict adherence to industry regulations. Dive into this video for a deeper understanding of building compliant ML solutions on GCP!

thumbnail.headline: GCP Model Governance Simplified
thumbnail.subheadline: Vertex AI & Assured Workloads for Financial Apps
